summary: Replayed ADR 0239 from the exact committed 0.177.62 mainline candidate by rebuilding the changelog and docs portals with the Pagefind-backed browser-local search experience, publishing the refreshed static directories through the shared NGINX edge lane, and re-verifying both the authenticated public edge contract and the published docs assets on nginx-lv3.

verification.observed: `uv run --with pytest --with-requirements requirements/docs.txt pytest -q tests/test_docs_site.py` returned `7 passed in 89.51s`, covering the Pagefind assets, the custom search partials, release-note wiring, and the dependency-graph regression that previously leaked raw frontmatter into rendered HTML.

`uv run --with-requirements requirements/docs.txt python3 scripts/build_docs_portal.py --generated-dir "$(mktemp -d /tmp/lv3-docs-generated.XXXXXX)" --output-dir "$(mktemp -d /tmp/lv3-docs-portal.XXXXXX)" --openapi-url ""` completed successfully, and `make docs` rebuilt `build/docs-portal/` with Pagefind reporting `Indexed 784 pages`, `Indexed 15027 words`, and `Indexed 6 filters` while the published-artifact secret scan passed.

A final `make deploy-docs-portal` replay from source commit `33c6c8ee925ac196c9dd6c144f967601414a9f57` completed successfully with `LV3_RUN_ID=c97cb4aa1dac456aa2ddf84efc3847f7`, playbook run id `6ff57b66f24244569474e12f830c9e1b`, and recap `nginx-lv3 ok=61 changed=3 failed=0 skipped=14` after publishing both `changelog-portal` and `docs-portal` into `/var/www/lv3-generated/`.

verification.check: External and guest verification of the published search surface
verification.observed: `curl -ksSI https://docs.lv3.org/` returned `HTTP/2 302` with `location: https://docs.lv3.org/oauth2/sign_in?rd=https://docs.lv3.org/` and `x-robots-tag: noindex, nofollow`. Direct guest checks on `nginx-lv3` confirmed `/var/www/lv3-generated/docs-portal/pagefind/pagefind-entry.json`, `pagefind/pagefind-ui.js`, and `pagefind/pagefind-ui.css`; the published home page contains `id="pagefind-search"` plus `pagefind/pagefind-ui.js`; `releases/0.177.62/index.html` contains `0.130.45`; and `architecture/dependency-graph/index.html` contains `data-pagefind-filter="section"` without the earlier raw frontmatter leak.

notes: This exact-main receipt supersedes the earlier branch-local ADR 0239 receipt as the canonical docs-search evidence on main.
The replay preserved the authenticated edge contract while advancing the mainline platform baseline from 0.130.44 to 0.130.45.
